mapper.insert: INSERT INTO auth_login_session ( sid, session_type, account_type, user_id, client_code, role_code, business_domain_id, login_identifier_masked, session_status, issued_at, expires_at, last_seen_at, refresh_token_hash, client_ip, user_agent ) VALUES (#{sid}, #{sessionType}, #{accountType}, #{userId}, #{clientCode}, #{roleCode}, #{businessDomainId}, #{loginIdentifierMasked}, #{sessionStatus}, #{issuedAt}, #{expiresAt}, #{lastSeenAt}, #{refreshTokenHash}, #{clientIp}, #{userAgent})
mapper.select: SELECT sid, session_type, account_type, user_id, client_code, role_code, business_domain_id, login_identifier_masked, session_status, issued_at, expires_at, last_seen_at, refresh_token_hash, client_ip, user_agent, revoked_at, revoked_reason FROM auth_login_session WHERE sid = #{sid} AND session_type = #{sessionType} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE auth_login_session SET session_status = 'expired', revoked_at = #{revokedAt}, revoked_reason = 'expired' WHERE sid = #{sid} AND session_type = #{sessionType} AND session_status = 'active'
UPDATE auth_login_session SET session_status = 'revoked' WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND session_status = 'active'
mapper.select: SELECT s.sid, s.user_id, s.client_code, COALESCE(sa.username, c.username, c.nickname, CONCAT(s.account_type, '-', s.user_id)) AS username, COALESCE(sa.phone, c.phone) AS mobile, COALESCE(sa.email, c.email) AS email, s.role_code, s.business_domain_id, s.login_identifier_masked, s.session_status, s.issued_at, s.expires_at, s.last_seen_at, s.client_ip, s.user_agent FROM auth_login_session s LEFT JOIN staff_account sa ON s.account_type = 'staff' AND sa.id = s.user_id LEFT JOIN customer_account c ON s.account_type = 'customer' AND c.id = s.user_id WHERE s.session_status = 'active' AND s.session_type = #{sessionType} AND s.expires_at > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3) ORDER BY COALESCE(s.last_seen_at, s.issued_at) DESC, s.issued_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
